Our Story & PHILOSOPHY

auto_stories

Our Story

Urjaa Mindz was born from a simple yet powerful realization — a child's true potential unfolds when nurtured with love, awareness, and the right stimulation from the very beginning. As mothers, we experienced firsthand how early brain-boosting activities, conscious engagement, and sensory-rich experiences created a visible difference in our own children's growth. What started as a personal journey soon transformed into a purpose — to empower other parents with the same awareness, tools, and confidence.

💞Emotional security
🧠Brain stimulation
🌈Sensory-rich experiences
💖Strong parent-child bonding
psychology

Philosophy

"स्नेहेन वर्धते बुद्धिः"

Where Affection Becomes the Foundation of Intelligence.

At Urjaa Mindz, we believe that a child's brain develops best not just through teaching, but through affection, connection, and meaningful engagement. When a child feels safe, valued, and connected, their mind naturally opens to explore, absorb, and grow.

The Hearts Behind Urjaa

Two mothers, one vision. Bringing a combined decade of experience in education and conscious parenting.

Jayashree Jain

Co-Founder

"Urjaa is my love letter to every child who feels too much and thinks too deeply."

Reema Tayshete

Co-Founder

"We are building a world where children grow like wildflowers — freely, beautifully, and rooted in love."

compost

Our Vision & Mission

Vision

Raising Aware Minds Through Love & Connection

  • 👉 Affection is the foundation of intelligence
  • 👉 Connection is the pathway to learning

A generation that blooms with creativity, confidence, and emotional strength 🌸

Mission

To Nurture Every Child's Mind Through Love-Led Development

  • 🌼 Build awareness about early brain development
  • 🧠 Provide brain-boosting cognitive activities
  • 🌈 Encourage sensory and experiential learning
  • 💞 Strengthen parent-child connection
  • 🌱 Support each child's unique potential

Be Part of the Growth

Our story is still being written, and we'd love for you and your family to be a chapter in it.

Learn More About Our Community

Nurturing the radiant energy within every mind through a blend of traditional warmth and modern understanding.
